So, so we have to manually, essentially, when we get a call book, just do all that work, like figure out, cool, are you in the right category?
We'll wait, we'll make a new workspace.
And then we'll just like manually using like whatever Claude pick, like 200 custom props for you.
And then we'll create the category if it doesn't exist.
So we'll probably.
Learn a bunch from doing that.
And then it also sounds like, Stevie, you have a couple of tickets.
So I don't know.
I guess some way I think that's way to just in the back of my head.
But yeah, as I said, I'll put together some kind of doc.

It won't be super heavy, but it can, like any learnings that you are gaining from talking to The only thing that I would just throw in however you can is like to have an escape hatch where they can at least flag or say like that is the issue.
And I don't know where it is.

Like if it's an onboarding on that screen, if they can't find something, they can, you know, because when I was going through that, I felt stuck because I had to essentially click the X or unintuitively pick something that doesn't match what I have in my head.
Like if I'm a product marketer, it's like almost blasphemy to like pick a different category.
So it's like very unlikely somebody will just do that.
Just like, oh, cool.
This is close enough.
Click it, you know.
So I think like you need an escape kind of path there to say like none of these match and then just type in something to have it either there or somewhere in the product.
And I think that can be a band-aid until we figure this out because at least that tells us like if people are running into this a lot.
Because I'm literally spending thousands of dollars like driving new users and if this is like, like I would like to know if this is like a more important issue or not.
They're not getting stuck in the onboarding phase on selecting categories.
They actually spend more time on competitors.
So we're going to actually cap the number of competitors because they get, they just spend forever.
Like they want to track every competitor it seems like.
So yeah, they actually spend less time on the category section.
But yeah.
I think I did have one ticket where like if you flip that around and pick competitors.
First, maybe we could just infer the category because it's interesting they spend more time on the competitor page.
Yeah, that's an interesting idea.
Yeah, it is.
It's been interesting to, like, hear even from, like, the current customers, like, what category they want to be because it's not always the one that their competitors are in.
But I'm also not exactly sure, you know, that's, I'm not talking directly to them.
So it's, you know, could be information filtered down that maybe, you know, something got lost in translation.
But, yeah, that's kind of an interesting thought.
Yeah, I think the issue is that we won't be able to, like, today we show the competitors based on the category.
So with all the categories, I don't think we have anything else to show relevant competitors.
We're going to show like just a mess of a list with like our brands.
Yeah.
I mean, I do know like you run that deep research at the beginning, right?
Or maybe that happens after you pick competitors, but I'm sure that just tells you who the competitors are.
It's going to be fairly accurate.
But anyway, I'm not trying to find a solution, but I think the two things, like one, I guess we need a process to make the index better and onboard and see what the right info.
then two, I think people like it's going to be impossible to get absolutely everything right.
And they need like some path to kind of either fix it themselves or like flag it for us.
Like in any case, we'll need both of those things.
So I'm going to work on the former because we're going to jump on a bunch of calls.
And then I think the latter would be really helpful as I'm driving more people.
Yeah, I just want to flag out today morning I replied to someone.
And Intercom asking to change their category.
Oh, yeah.
Yeah.
No, it's as we've known.
I mean, Jason, you and I have talked about this for a couple of weeks now.
And it's just something that we couldn't tackle for the launch.
But, yeah, it's a known issue.
I'll get something together.
I'll just focus on it today.
I think one nice idea is it's a layer of things, right?
I think the most reliable ways to determine the category based on mentions, right?
The prompts that gather more mentions for a specific brand, we see from where these prompts are.
And that's the category we should.
Because at least they will see the dashboard as full.
As we're
We can give them, right?
Yeah, but like a lot of prompts don't show any brands are mentioned.
Like, I mean, there's very, like, or I'm sorry, a lot of brands aren't mentioned, like the smaller ones especially aren't being mentioned.
So we'll have to figure out what to do with those.
Yeah, yeah, but that's why I mentioned it's a layer of things.
Then I think that what Jason suggested is it's very interesting to infer the category based on the competitors they choose.
These are good ideas.
Yeah.
Yeah, just to add that, like, Jason and Stevie was showing earlier this meeting that she put together, like, a funnel of her onboarding process.
So I think we'll be clear, like, when there's a drop, like, there's a churn in a certain step of the onboarding.
That's great.
And I was going to suggest, I know that I never worked with PostHog, but I know that it has...
As experiments, and I think we should start taking a look on that, because if we change the onboarding, we should always be optimizing it, right?
So be more data-driven now that we have something in place.
But I agree, Stevie, I saw Daniel working on workflows that I think he was trying to tackle that, like how to categorize brands, but it was like in the output channel, maybe he was just exploring.
I think it's worth to check with him.
Yeah, just to add that our subcategorization, it's not great.
Like I was testing it a lot, since the beginning.
This was one of the first things that we didn't check that, and we definitely need to improve it.
But I think he's tackled on that, but just, yeah.
Yeah, that's why it'll be helpful to put everything in a doc, like, you know, as, yeah, everybody's ideas, basically.
It's just, like, I'll just state the problem and, you know, have, like, all these different...
Different ideas, and the assumptions we're making, and all of that, and I'll just get that done today, because it's, I'm not going to do like some heavy multi-page PRD.
And then I can just share it out for Monday, and maybe that can be our discussion for that second meeting, because it has Marcel and Daniel in it.
So, and I'll share it, like, I'll try to share it.
As soon as I get, like, just, like, the scaffolding done on it, so everyone can contribute.
Sound good?
Yeah, awesome.
Yeah, I have one more thing to flag out for you, Jason.
I migrated the customer IO to the US instance.
Oh, okay.
I would like you to review the campaign I created there.
I tried to copy and paste it.
I
There is no export and import, so I did it manually.
Yeah, we are sending emails from, welcome emails, right?
You said you guys were doing that manually yesterday, but actually, customer AIO is sending welcome emails from Europe.
Oh, it was actually working yesterday?
And running?
Okay.
Yes.
Don't tell Yusuf.
Okay, cool.
Yeah, so I have the checklist for us to start working with the U.S.
I just want you to review the campaign and give me the thumbs up that we can start sending emails from there.

And then I will go through the checklist to disable Europe and enable U.S.
Sounds good.
Okay.
Let's see.
Thanks, everyone.
everyone.

We'll

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review launch performance and align on immediate priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding is a critical blocker.** A bug creating empty workspaces and the difficulty of fixing a wrong category selection are the top user-facing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Analytics tracking is broken.** The `event_checkout_completed` event is incorrectly logging signups, showing 0 conversions. A new, accurate event is required to fix the dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Customer.io is migrating to the US.** This move is required because email zones are tied to individual accounts, not workspaces. The new US campaign needs Jason's review before go-live.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Impersonation is live but needs controls.** The new feature lacks logging and expiration, creating a regulatory risk (especially in Europe) and requiring a formal access policy.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding & Workspace Issues

  - [**Empty Workspaces Bug:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [**Problem:** New users get empty workspaces because \~2,000 shared library prompts added after November lack the `leaderboard` tag. The onboarding logic incorrectly relies on this tag to bootstrap workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [**Fix:** Estevão will modify the bootstrap process to add *all* active shared library prompts, ignoring the tag for now.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Empty Subcategories:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Problem:** Marcel is creating new subcategories, which can appear in the onboarding dropdown before prompts are added, leading to a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Interim Fix:** Estevão will hide subcategories from the dropdown if they contain no prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [**Long-Term Fix:** A "draft/publish" status for categories is needed to prevent this.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [**Incorrect Category Selection:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
      - [**Problem:** Users get stuck if they select the wrong product category, as there's no way to change it. This is a critical issue because the entire product experience depends on this initial choice.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
      - [**Solution:** Stevie will create a doc today outlining the problem and potential solutions, including:](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
          - [An "escape hatch" in onboarding to flag incorrect categories.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
          - [Inferring categories from competitor selections.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2515.0)
          - [Using mention data to suggest categories.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Jason is driving new users, and this issue is a major source of friction.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)

### Analytics & Tracking

  - [**Broken Signup Conversion Funnel:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Problem:** The `event_checkout_completed` event is incorrectly used to track onboarding completion, causing the dashboard to show 0 conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [**Solution:** Estevão will add a new, accurate event for onboarding completion.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**User Behavior Insights:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Finding:** Users are actively engaged post-onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Metric:** \~13 accounts have changed their competitors, and \~13 have customized their prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### System & Infrastructure

  - [**Customer.io US Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Problem:** Customer.io's email zones are tied to individual accounts, not workspaces, requiring a US instance to send emails from the correct region.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Status:** Pedro has created a US account, cloned the welcome campaign, and connected RudderStack.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason must review the new US campaign before go-live.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Impersonation Feature:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Status:** Pedro implemented a quick impersonation feature for Marcel to view user workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Risk:** The current implementation lacks logging and expiration, creating a regulatory risk, particularly in Europe.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Action:** A formal access policy is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [**Weekend On-Call:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [**Decision:** No formal rotation is needed yet. The team will use informal communication to ensure coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [Fix the onboarding bootstrap logic to add all shared library prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [Hide empty subcategories from the onboarding dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [Add a new, accurate event for onboarding completion.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [Create a doc outlining the category selection problem and potential solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
      - [Organize the "post-launch" backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
      - [Review the new Customer.io US welcome campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Complete the cadence feature to reduce infrastructure spend.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Provide Jason with the checklist for the Customer.io US migration.](https://fathom.video/share/KUr5d2crLzjs3ThHSVceNemxvNAxRFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)

action_items.description: Fix onboarding analytics: add onboarding-complete event; update dashboards; document first pageview; add library/custom prompts
Fix onboarding analytics: add onboarding-complete event; update dashboards; document first pageview; add library/custom prompts
Finish cadence optimization to halve spend
Review impersonation compliance/security; consult legal if needed
Update bootstrap: add all shared library prompts to workspaces; ignore leaderboard flag
Post to Daniel/Marcel: confirm leaderboard definition
Filter onboarding subcategory dropdown to show only subcategories w/ prompts
Create categories/brands doc; share w/ Daniel, Marcel, Jason
Review Pedro's US Customer.io welcome campaign; approve; then execute US cutover checklist
